subject: Everything goes away at midnight
body:
This offer is only good for less than 48hrs (11:59PM Monday PT).

This recap also comes with a letter I wrote you that summarizes how money models work and how they can help you grow your business.

Here it is. Enjoy

>>> recap.acq.com

You're gonna love 'em,

Alex

PS - Don't stress about distributing the books. You'll get a code to give out 199 free copies to friends/employees/audience, you name it. They can claim theirs anytime over the next year. We'll ship it right to them (they just cover shipping & handling).
